title: White musk soy candle
subtitle: A clean, light container soy candle with white musk fragrance oil
excerpt: White musk is a clean, neutral fragrance that adds presence to a room without a specific floral or citrus identity. It works well in any room. This is a simple container candle in a clear glass jar: soy wax, fragrance at 8%, single wick. The result is understated and lasts well.
sourceNotes: White musk fragrance oil in soy candles: Candlescience and Bramble Berry formulation guides (2022, 2023). Soy container wax pour temperature and fragrance load at 8%: standard container candle reference data. White musk fragrance classification: polycyclic musk compounds are regulated under EU Cosmetics Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009; candle-grade white musk FOs comply with IFRA category 12.

recipe.batchNotes: Scale proportionally. Pour multiple jars from the same batch for consistent scent strength.
recipe.makeAheadNotes: Allow 48 hours after pouring before first burn for the fragrance to bind fully with the soy wax.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: The candle keeps several years. Replace the lid after each burn to slow fragrance loss. Store away from heat and direct light.

glossaryTerms.definition: The first burn establishes the wax pool pattern for all subsequent burns. Burn until the pool reaches the full jar diameter to prevent tunnelling.
The temperature at which wax is poured into the container. Soy container wax pours cleanly at 60 to 65 degrees C.

content.text: White musk is among the most versatile candle fragrances: present in a room without competing with furnishings, food smells, or other scents in the house. This is a straightforward container candle with no additives, dyes, or secondary fragrances. The method is the same as for any soy container candle: melt, cool to the
, add fragrance, pour, and leave undisturbed.

items.prepNote: 8% of wax weight; use a candle-rated fragrance oil
ECO-4 or CD-12 for a 6 to 7 cm jar

content.text: Melt wax over a water bath only. Never leave melting wax unattended. Keep a kitchen fire blanket within reach.
Melt the soy wax over a water bath to 75 degrees C. Remove from heat and cool to 60 to 65 degrees C. Stir in the white musk fragrance oil and mix for 2 minutes.
Centre the pre-tabbed wick with a wick bar. Pour at 60 to 65 degrees C. Leave undisturbed for at least 8 hours. Trim the wick to 5 mm before the first burn.
rule: burn on the first light until the wax pool reaches the full jar diameter, around 2 to 3 hours. Extinguishing early causes the wax to tunnel on all subsequent burns.
Replace the lid after each burn. Store away from heat and direct light. The candle keeps several years.
